verdict: Vanicream's moisturizer is minimalist and dye-fragrance-free with basic barrier support from ceramide-3. Effective for sensitive skin but less comprehensive than CeraVe's multi-ceramide approach.

_research.name: Vanicream Daily Facial Moisturizer
pros: Clean ingredient list with zero common irritants
Ideal for reactive or compromised skin
_research.con: Single ceramide and lacking hyaluronic acid compared to superior budget alternatives.
